title: CreeperNetherSpawn
description: So simple Creeper can spawn in nether
body:
Place in plugins server and use

Config.yml :

```
creeper-spawn:
  spawn-radius-per-player: 64
  spawn-radius-per-player-min: 16
  spawn-radius-per-player-y: 32
  points-per-second:
    land: 5
    air: 1
    sea: 2
    lava: 1
    ground: 0
  max-generation-time: 20
  limit-multiplier: 1.2
```

![preview](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/462248c6859a849e989b78de65c76e88b24cdc93.png)
